name: Heavy Vehicle Repair and Modification Safe Harbor

eligibility.description: Owners of existing heavy vehicles can perform significant upgrades or repairs without triggering the retail excise tax, provided costs stay below the 75% threshold.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Repairs or modifications to a heavy truck are not treated as 'manufacture' (triggering the 12% tax) if the cost does not exceed 75% of the price of a comparable new article.
